name: Absolute Drift
description: Absolute Drift is a racing game about becoming a master at the art of drifting.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows XP / Vista / 7 / 8 / 10 (64-bit Systems Only)
  • Processor: 2.2GHz Dual Core
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 512 MB RAM
  • Storage: 350 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: Best played with controller.
comment1: A game i got for 1.99$ I figured it would be a drift game with a few tracks and free mode to mess around in but i was surprised to see there is a lot of things you can do in the game more than i had expected. It doesn't take long to beat if you put your mind to it but overall a very good game for the price i had paid! Beat it within hours on record. 10/10
comment2: Takes a second to get used to the drifting controls. Once you figure it out, this game is really lot of fun. I love the art style. It makes the game stand out just a bit from other racers of the same price. This is the type of game you can just pick up and get into immediately. It's easy to play, but hard to master.
comment3: This game is unplayable on controller. the steering, which is the whole point of the game is terrible.
